description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]* and on workflow dispatch. The workflow runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, verifies that the source code and git tag version numbers match, installs build requirements, builds the package, publishes it to PyPI using a secret PyPI API token, and creates or updates a GitHub release with changelog link.
